body:
Omar, hope the new year is treating you well — I've been meaning to reach out since the holidays wrapped up. I wanted to get your read on a few founders we've been tracking at [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital), particularly a couple of early-stage teams working at the intersection of grid modernization and ML-driven load forecasting. Your background in energy markets makes your perspective genuinely useful here, and I don't want to waste the opportunity. Would you have 30 minutes sometime in the next two weeks for a quick call? I can send over some brief memos in advance so we're not starting from scratch.

Amara
